headline: Nvidia certifies Samsung, SK Hynix and Micron for Vera Rubin HBM4 supply
summary: The announcement, reported by Bloomberg, ends months of supply-chain speculation about which chipmakers would qualify for Vera Rubin — the successor to Nvidia's Grace Blackwell GPU architecture designed for what Huang calls "agentic AI" workloads.
